signIn.title: Sign in to SubterraDB
signIn.subtitle: Manage every Supabase project from a single control plane.

hero.headline: One control plane for <accent>every project</accent>.
hero.subtitle: Run dozens of isolated Supabase projects on a single server. Same SDK, same RLS, no per-project VMs.

multiProject.title: Multi-project Studio
multiProject.description: Manage every project from a single UI.

lightweight.title: Lightweight footprint
lightweight.description: Around 180 MB of RAM per project.

dropIn.title: Drop-in compatible
dropIn.description: Same Supabase SDK — only the URL and keys change.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Every Supabase project on this server, in one place. Spin them up, monitor activity, and jump into any project's Studio.
dashboard.countLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No projects} one {# project} other {# projects}}

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: This SubterraDB instance is fresh. Create your first project to spin up isolated REST, Auth, Storage, and Realtime endpoints in a few seconds.

new.title: Create a new project
new.subtitle: Set up a new isolated Supabase project on this server. Takes about 30 seconds once you confirm.

errors.slugTaken: A project with this slug already exists. Pick a different one.
errors.kongFailed: Failed to provision the gateway routes for this project. Please retry.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

basics.title: Project basics
basics.subtitle: Name your project and pick a slug for its services.

database.title: Database
database.subtitle: Set the password for the project's Postgres database.

services.title: Enabled services
services.subtitle: Pick which Supabase services this project should run.

access.title: Initial access
access.subtitle: Optionally invite team members right away.

fields.name: Project name
fields.slugHelper: Used as the URL prefix and container suffix. Lowercase, hyphens only.
fields.dbPasswordHelper: Stored encrypted on the server. Used internally by the project's services — you'll rarely need to type it again.
fields.postgrestHelper: Auto-generated REST API over your tables.
fields.invitesHelper: Comma-separated emails. Each will receive an invite link.

sql.title: SQL Editor
sql.description: Run queries against this project's database with full service_role access.

tables.title: Table Editor
tables.description: Browse the public schema, inspect rows, and tweak data without leaving the GUI.

auth.title: Auth Manager
auth.description: Create and manage users in this project's auth schema.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Buckets and files served by this project's Storage container.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Tail container logs from PostgREST, GoTrue, and Storage in real time.

storage.pageSubtitle: Buckets and objects served by this project's Storage container.
storage.newBucketDescription: Buckets group related files. Public buckets serve files without auth.
storage.bucketNameHelper: Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes. 3-63 characters.
storage.makePublicHelper: Anyone with the URL can read files in this bucket.
storage.noBuckets: No buckets yet — create your first one.
storage.selectBucket: Pick a bucket on the left to see its objects.
storage.noObjects: Empty bucket — upload your first file.

logs.pageSubtitle: Stream container logs from PostgREST, GoTrue and Storage in real time.
logs.noLogs: No log lines yet. They'll appear here as the container produces them.

sql.pageSubtitle: Run any SQL against this project's database. Queries execute as service_role inside a transaction — failures roll back automatically.
sql.title: Query
sql.resultsMeta: {count, plural, =0 {0 rows} one {# row} other {# rows}} · {ms}ms
sql.rowCountOnly: {count, plural, =0 {0 rows affected} one {# row affected} other {# rows affected}}
sql.hint: Hit Run to execute the query above.

tables.pageSubtitle: Browse and inspect the tables in this project's public schema.
tables.noTables: No tables yet — create one from the SQL editor.
tables.insertRowDescription: Leave a column blank to use NULL or its default value.
tables.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# row selected} other {# rows selected}}
tables.deleteSelected: Delete {count, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}}

cell.placeholderNullable: Enter a value or leave blank for NULL

auth.pageSubtitle: Manage users in this project's GoTrue auth schema.
auth.noUsers: No users yet. The first time someone signs up via the SDK they'll appear here.
auth.rowCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 users} one {# user} other {# users}}

delete.title: Delete "{name}"?
delete.description: This action is irreversible. Everything below will be removed:

bullets.containers: The postgrest and gotrue containers for this project
bullets.database: The Postgres database and all of its data
bullets.kong: All Kong gateway routes and credentials
bullets.keys: The anon and service_role keys (existing apps will break)

errors.projects_not_found: Project not found. It may already have been deleted.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

comingSoon.description: This panel will be available once the control-plane backend is wired up. The visual layout is locked in — only the data source is missing.

connection.title: Connection details
connection.subtitle: Drop these into your Supabase client to talk to this project.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.subtitle: Plug this project into Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf and any MCP-aware editor.
mcp.testTitle: Test the config from a terminal
mcp.testDescription: Run this on the same machine that will host the editor — it should print the JSON-RPC tools list.
mcp.shippedNote: The MCP server lives at <path></path> inside this SubterraDB checkout. To use it from a developer machine that doesn't have SubterraDB cloned, mount or clone the SubterraDB repo locally and update the args path. Publishing to npm is also an option — see packages/mcp-server/README.md.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Per-project containers managed by SubterraDB.
services.countLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No services} one {# service} other {# services}}

page.title: Members
page.subtitle: Everyone with access to this SubterraDB instance. Invite developers and assign them to specific projects, or grant full admin rights.

forbidden.title: Admin access required
forbidden.description: Member management is restricted to administrators. Ask one of your admins if you need access to a project.

table.title: All members
table.subtitle: Manage roles and project assignments.
table.countLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No members} one {# member} other {# members}}
table.projectsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No projects} one {# project} other {# projects}}

page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure how this SubterraDB instance behaves. These settings apply to every project.

comingSoon.description: This panel will be available once the control-plane backend is wired up. The visual layout is locked in — only the data source is missing.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Basic instance information visible to every member.

instanceName.label: Instance name
instanceName.helper: Shown in the browser title and emails sent by SubterraDB.

defaultLocale.label: Default language
defaultLocale.helper: Used for new members until they pick their own.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.helper: Affects how timestamps are displayed across the app.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Authentication and session policies for the control plane.

sessionTimeout.label: Session timeout (minutes)
sessionTimeout.helper: Members are signed out after this many minutes of inactivity.

minPasswordLength.label: Minimum password length
minPasswordLength.helper: Members will be prompted to update if their password is shorter.

mfaRequired.label: Require MFA for admins
mfaRequired.helper: Administrators must set up an authenticator app on next sign-in.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: How the Kong gateway exposes per-project services.

gatewayHost.label: Gateway hostname
gatewayHost.helper: Public hostname Kong listens on. Project URLs use this as a prefix.

portRange.label: Project port range
portRange.helper: TCP port range allocated to per-project containers.

tlsEnabled.label: Enable TLS
tlsEnabled.helper: Terminate HTTPS at the gateway with the configured certificate.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Irreversible actions. Read carefully before clicking.

exportData.label: Export all project data
exportData.description: Bundle every project's database into a single archive.

reset.label: Reset SubterraDB
reset.description: Stop and remove every project. Members and audit logs are kept.

factoryReset.label: Factory reset
factoryReset.description: Wipe everything: projects, members, audit logs. Cannot be undone.

page.title: Gateway
page.subtitle: Live view of the Kong gateway. Every per-project service routes through here.

routes.title: Registered routes
routes.subtitle: Every project + service combination registered with Kong's Admin API.
routes.countLabel: {count, plural, =0 {No routes} one {# route} other {# routes}}
